Note: This schedule is subject to change (as needed).

Week Lecture Topic Due
Week 1 01/03/23 Tue, 01/03 Lecture 0 What is Programming?
01/04/23 Wed, 01/04 Lecture 1 Hardware and Software
01/06/23 Fri, 01/06 Lecture 2 Writing Programs
Week 2 01/09/23 Mon, 01/09 Lecture 3 Data Types, Operators, and Variables Homework 0 Setting Up and Signing Up
01/11/23 Wed, 01/11 Lecture 4 Functions + Tutorial 1 Tutorial 0 Writing Our Own Programs
01/13/23 Fri, 01/13 Lecture 5 Abstraction (Mini-Quiz 0)
Week 3 01/16/23 Mon, 01/16 NO CLASS (MLK Day) HW1 Introductory Exercises
01/18/23 Wed, 01/18 Lecture 6 Writing Flexible Functions Tutorial 1 Practice with Functions
01/20/23 Fri, 01/20 Lecture 7 Practice Writing Functions (Mini-Quiz 1)
Week 4 01/23/23 Mon, 01/23 Lecture 8 Writing Reporters HW2 Writing Functions
01/25/23 Wed, 01/25 Lecture 9 Sequences (Tuples) and Modules Tutorial 2 Practice with Parameters & Arguments
01/27/23 Fri, 01/27 Lecture 10 Lists! and more functions... (Mini-Quiz 2)
Week 5 01/30/23 Mon, 01/30 Lecture 11 Quiz 1 Review HW3 Make a Creature
01/31/23 Tue, 01/31 Lecture 11a Q1 Review Session
02/01/23 Wed, 02/01 quiz 1 Quiz 1 QUIZ 1
02/03/23 Fri, 02/03 Lecture 12
Week 6 02/06/23 Mon, 02/06 Lecture 13
02/08/23 Wed, 02/08 Lecture 14
02/10/23 Fri, 02/10 Lecture 15
Week 7 02/13/23 Mon, 02/13 Lecture 16
02/15/23 Wed, 02/15 Lecture 17
02/17/23 Fri, 02/17 Lecture 18
Week 8 02/20/23 Mon, 02/20 Lecture 19
02/22/23 Wed, 02/22 quiz 2 Quiz 2 QUIZ 2
02/24/23 Fri, 02/24 Lecture 20
Week 9 02/27/23 Mon, 02/27 Lecture 21
03/01/23 Wed, 03/01 Lecture 22
03/03/23 Fri, 03/03 Lecture 23
Week 10 03/06/23 Mon, 03/06 Lecture 24
03/08/23 Wed, 03/08 Lecture 25
03/10/23 Fri, 03/10 quiz 3 Quiz 3 QUIZ 3

Department of Computer Science, Northwestern University.
